center.name: Rodolphe Meyer de Schauensee
center.summary: Rodolphe Meyer de Schauensee是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Choco toucan、Dugand's antwren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Choco toucan (Ramphastos brevis) is a near-passerine bird in the family Ramphastidae, the toucans, toucanets, and aracaris

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Dugand's antwren (Herpsilochmus dugandi) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J
